Language: go
LLM-powered framework for deep document understanding, semantic retrieval, and context-aware answers using RAG paradigm.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: XTLS/Xray-core
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/XTLS/Xray-core
Language: go
Xray, Penetrates Everything. Also the best v2ray-core. Where the magic happens. An open platform for various uses.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: authelia/authelia
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/authelia/authelia
Language: go
The Single Sign-On Multi-Factor portal for web apps, now OpenID Certified™

ns0:entry.ns0:title: casdoor/casdoor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/casdoor/casdoor
Language: go
An open-source AI-first Identity and Access Management (IAM) /AI MCP gateway and auth server with web UI supporting MCP, A2A, OAuth 2.1, OIDC, SAML, CAS, LDAP, SCIM, WebAuthn, TOTP, MFA, Face ID, Google Workspace, Azure AD

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudreve/cloudreve
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudreve/cloudreve
Language: go
🌩 Self-hosted file management and sharing system, supports multiple storage providers

ns0:entry.ns0:title: evcc-io/evcc
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/evcc-io/evcc
Language: go
solar charging ☀️🚘

ns0:entry.ns0:title: go-vikunja/vikunja
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/go-vikunja/vikunja
Language: go
The to-do app to organize your life.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hyperledger/fabric
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hyperledger/fabric
Language: go
Hyperledger Fabric is an enterprise-grade permissioned distributed ledger framework for developing solutions and applications. Its modular and versatile design satisfies a broad range of industry use cases. It offers a unique approach to consensus that enables performance at scale while preserving privacy.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ipfs/kubo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ipfs/kubo
Language: go
An IPFS implementation in Go

ns0:entry.ns0:title: keploy/keploy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/keploy/keploy
Language: go
API, Integration, E2E Testing Agent for Developers that actually work. Generate tests, mocks/stubs for your APIs!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: looplj/axonhub
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/looplj/axonhub
Language: go
⚡️ Open-source AI Gateway — Use any SDK to call 100+ LLMs. Built-in failover, load balancing, cost control & end-to-end tracing.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mudler/LocalAI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mudler/LocalAI
Language: go
🤖 The free, Open Source alternative to OpenAI, Claude and others. Self-hosted and local-first. Drop-in replacement, running on consumer-grade hardware. No GPU required. Runs gguf, transformers, diffusers and many more. Features: Generate Text, MCP, Audio, Video, Images, Voice Cloning, Distributed, P2P and decentralized inference

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
